title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 260 至 560 行，共 1441 行) ---
 260 |         tool_count = 0
 261 | 
 262 |         for msg in messages:
 263 |             # 统计错误消息
 264 |             content = str(msg.get("content", ""))
 265 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["Error", "错误", "Exception", "失败", "Traceback"]):
 266 |                 error_count += 1
 267 | 
 268 |             # 统计工具调用
 269 |             if msg.get("role") == "tool":
 270 |                 tool_count += 1
 271 | 
 272 |         # 计算占比
 273 |         total = len(messages)
 274 |         error_ratio = error_count / total
 275 |         tool_ratio = tool_count / total
 276 | 
 277 |         print(f"   [策略选择] 错误占比: {error_ratio:.2%}, 工具占比: {tool_ratio:.2%}")
 278 | 
 279 |         # 决策逻辑
 280 |         if error_ratio > self.error_dense_threshold:
 281 |             print(f"   [策略选择] 错误密集 → LLM_SUMMARY")
 282 |             return CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY
 283 | 
 284 |         if tool_ratio > self.tool_dense_threshold:
 285 |             print(f"   [策略选择] 工具密集 → KEYFRAME")
 286 |             return CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME
 287 | 
 288 |         print(f"   [策略选择] 一般对话 → SLIDING_WINDOW")
 289 |         return CompressionStrategy.SLIDING_WINDOW
 290 | 
 291 |     # ========== 策略 1: LLM 摘要 ==========
 292 | 
 293 |     async def _compress_with_llm(
 294 |         self,
 295 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 296 |         llm_summarizer_func: Optional[Callable],
 297 |         existing_summary: str,
 298 |         min_keep: int
 299 |     ) -> CompressionResult:
 300 |         """
 301 |         使用 LLM 生成摘要（当前策略）
 302 | 
 303 |         🔥 Phase 2 优化：
 304 |         - 添加缓存机制（避免重复调用）
 305 |         - 添加频率限制（每小时最多 10 次）
 306 |         - 超限时降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW
 307 | 
 308 |         Args:
 309 |             messages: 消息列表
 310 |             llm_summarizer_func: LLM 摘要函数
 311 |             existing_summary: 已有的摘要
 312 |             min_keep: 最少保留的消息数量
 313 | 
 314 |         Returns:
 315 |             CompressionResult
 316 |         """
 317 |         if not llm_summarizer_func:
 318 |             print("   [警告] LLM_SUMMARY 策略需要 llm_summarizer_func，降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW")
 319 |             return self._compress_with_sliding_window(messages, 0.3, min_keep)
 320 | 
 321 |         # 划分消息：最近完整 turn 原样保留，较旧完整 turn 作为摘要候选。
 322 |         keep_messages = self._select_recent_complete_turn_messages(messages, min_keep)
 323 |         keep_start = len(messages)
 324 |         if keep_messages:
 325 |             keep_start = min(
 326 |                 messages.index(msg)
 327 |                 for msg in keep_messages
 328 |                 if msg in messages
 329 |             )
 330 |         to_summarize = self._select_summary_candidate_messages(messages[:keep_start])
 331 |         builder = TurnBuilder()
 332 |         safe_turns = builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(messages))
 333 |         summarized_turns = builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(to_summarize))
 334 |         keep_turn_ids = {turn.id for turn in builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(keep_messages))}
 335 |         dropped_turns = [turn for turn in safe_turns if turn.id not in keep_turn_ids and all(turn.id != st.id for st in summarized_turns)]
 336 |         compressed_state = self._extract_compressed_state(safe_turns, dropped_turns)
 337 | 
 338 |         # 🔥 Phase 2: 检查缓存
 339 |         messages_hash = self._get_messages_hash(to_summarize)
 340 |         if messages_hash in self.summary_cache:
 341 |             print(f"   ✅ 命中缓存：直接使用已有摘要")
 342 |             cached_summary = self.summary_cache[messages_hash]
 343 |             return CompressionResult(
 344 |                 success=True,
 345 |                 strategy=CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY,
 346 |                 compressed_messages=keep_messages,
 347 |                 summary=cached_summary,
 348 |                 compression_ratio=len(keep_messages) / len(messages) if messages else 0,
 349 |  ...
